unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: Curl_debug
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, curl_infotype type, char *ptr, size_t size)

function.name: Curl_failf

unit.comment: /* Curl_infof() is for info message along the way */

function.name: Curl_infof
Curl_trc_cf_infof

unit.decl_stmt: static struct Curl_cftype *cf_types[] = { &Curl_cft_tcp, &Curl_cft_udp, &Curl_cft_unix, &Curl_cft_tcp_accept, &Curl_cft_happy_eyeballs, &Curl_cft_setup, #ifdef USE_NGHTTP2 &Curl_cft_nghttp2, #endif #ifdef USE_SSL &Curl_cft_ssl, #ifndef CURL_DISABLE_PROXY &Curl_cft_ssl_proxy, #endif #endif #if !defined(CURL_DISABLE_PROXY) #if !defined(CURL_DISABLE_HTTP) &Curl_cft_h1_proxy, #ifdef USE_NGHTTP2 &Curl_cft_h2_proxy, #endif &Curl_cft_http_proxy, #endif /* !CURL_DISABLE_HTTP */ &Curl_cft_haproxy, &Curl_cft_socks_proxy, #endif /* !CURL_DISABLE_PROXY */ #ifdef ENABLE_QUIC &Curl_cft_http3, #endif #if !defined(CURL_DISABLE_HTTP) && !defined(USE_HYPER) &Curl_cft_http_connect, #endif NULL, };

function.name: Curl_trc_opt
Curl_trc_init
